title: Customer left UK data share business as usual 2025
body: "This agreement is published as part of the Code of Practice for public authorities disclosing information under chapters 1, 3 and 4 (Public Service Delivery, Debt and Fraud) of part 5 of the Digital Economy Act 2017.  The purpose of the data share is to identify customers who failed to notify HMRC of a change in circumstances. This data share aims to identify fraud and reduce the financial losses to the Exchequer. "
